title: Public reproducibility package for doctoral manuscripts on electricity price forecasting, load forecasting, and virtual power plant decision learning
description: Pre-DOI staging metadata for a public reproducibility repository. The real public release must be created only after author approval, final license recheck, and repository DOI issuance. Upstream public data retain their own licenses.
notes: MIT applies to repository coordination code and metadata after author approval. Public-source data files remain governed by their upstream licenses and redistribution notes.
